```{r regular-report-functions, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
    new_wide <- new_counts %>%
      pivot_wider(
        names_from = site,
        values_from = n_new,
        values_fill = 0,
        names_prefix = "new_"
      ) %>%
      add_missing_site_cols(c("new_Harlem", "new_Kings", "new_Total"))

    cum_wide <- cumulative_counts %>%
      pivot_wider(
        names_from = site,
        values_from = n_cumulative,
        values_fill = 0,
        names_prefix = "cum_"
      ) %>%
      add_missing_site_cols(c("cum_Harlem", "cum_Kings", "cum_Total"))

    tibble(
      study_bucket = factor(study_bucket_levels_regular, levels = study_bucket_levels_regular)
    ) %>%
      left_join(new_wide, by = "study_bucket") %>%
      left_join(cum_wide, by = "study_bucket") %>%
      mutate(
        period_label = pl,
        metric_type = metric_type,
        event_class = event_type,
        new_Harlem = coalesce(new_Harlem, 0L),
        cum_Harlem = coalesce(cum_Harlem, 0L),
        new_Kings  = coalesce(new_Kings, 0L),
        cum_Kings  = coalesce(cum_Kings, 0L),
        new_Total  = coalesce(new_Total, 0L),
        cum_Total  = coalesce(cum_Total, 0L)
      ) %>%
      select(
        period_label,
        metric_type,
        event_class,
        study_bucket,
        new_Harlem,
        cum_Harlem,
        new_Kings,
        cum_Kings,
        new_Total,
        cum_Total
      )
  })
}

weekly_monthly_encounter_sae <- make_regular_wide_table(
  event_master, periods_tbl, metric_type = "encounters", event_type = "SAE"
)

weekly_monthly_encounter_ae <- make_regular_wide_table(
  event_master, periods_tbl, metric_type = "encounters", event_type = "AE"
)

weekly_monthly_participant_sae <- make_regular_wide_table(
  event_master, periods_tbl, metric_type = "participants", event_type = "SAE"
)

weekly_monthly_participant_ae <- make_regular_wide_table(
  event_master, periods_tbl, metric_type = "participants", event_type = "AE"
)
```

```{r regular-report-build-gts, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
make_weekly_gt <- function(df, week_label, metric_label, event_label) {
  df %>%
    filter(period_label == week_label) %>%
    select(
      `Study Bucket` = study_bucket,
      `Harlem New` = new_Harlem,
      `Harlem Cumulative` = cum_Harlem,
      `Kings New` = new_Kings,
      `Kings Cumulative` = cum_Kings,
      `Total New` = new_Total,
      `Total Cumulative` = cum_Total
    ) %>%
    gt() %>%
    tab_header(
      title = md(paste0("**", event_label, " — ", metric_label, "**")),
      subtitle = md(paste0("**Week:** ", week_label))
    ) %>%
    tab_spanner(
      label = "Harlem",
      columns = c(`Harlem New`, `Harlem Cumulative`)
    ) %>%
    tab_spanner(
      label = "Kings",
      columns = c(`Kings New`, `Kings Cumulative`)
    ) %>%
    tab_spanner(
      label = "Total",
      columns = c(`Total New`, `Total Cumulative`)
    ) %>%
    cols_label(
      `Harlem New` = "New",
      `Harlem Cumulative` = "Cumulative",
      `Kings New` = "New",
      `Kings Cumulative` = "Cumulative",
      `Total New` = "New",
      `Total Cumulative` = "Cumulative"
    ) %>%
    cols_align(
      align = "center",
      columns = c(`Harlem New`, `Harlem Cumulative`, `Kings New`, `Kings Cumulative`, `Total New`, `Total Cumulative`)
    ) %>%
    fmt_number(
      columns = c(`Harlem New`, `Harlem Cumulative`, `Kings New`, `Kings Cumulative`, `Total New`, `Total Cumulative`),
      decimals = 0
    ) %>%
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(100),
      data_row.padding = px(4)
    )
}

regular_report_gts <- list()

if (SHOW_REGULAR_AE_SAE_TABLES && REPORT_MODE %in% c("weekly", "monthly")) {
  for (p in unique(periods_tbl$period_label)) {
    regular_report_gts[[paste0(p, "_enc_sae")]] <- make_weekly_gt(
      weekly_monthly_encounter_sae, p, "Unique Encounters / Events", "SAE"
    )
    regular_report_gts[[paste0(p, "_enc_ae")]] <- make_weekly_gt(
      weekly_monthly_encounter_ae, p, "Unique Encounters / Events", "AE"
    )
    regular_report_gts[[paste0(p, "_pt_sae")]] <- make_weekly_gt(
      weekly_monthly_participant_sae, p, "Unique Participants", "SAE"
    )
    regular_report_gts[[paste0(p, "_pt_ae")]] <- make_weekly_gt(
      weekly_monthly_participant_ae, p, "Unique Participants", "AE"
    )
  }
}
```

```{r regular-report-output, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# ========================= RUN REGULAR REPORT TABLES =======================

emit_gt <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, "gt_tbl")) {
    print(x)
  }
}

if (exists("regular_report_gts")) {
  for (g in regular_report_gts) emit_gt(g)
}
```

## DSMB Tables 
```{r dsmb-4-1, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dsmb_events <- event_master %>%
  filter(!is.na(event_class), visit_date <= DATA_LOCK)

randomized_subjects <- roster_key %>%
  filter(tx_group %in% c("Control", "TX")) %>%
  distinct(participant_id, tx_group)

dsmb_4_1 <- randomized_subjects %>%
  left_join(
    dsmb_events %>%
      filter(event_class == "SAE") %>%
      distinct(participant_id) %>%
      mutate(has_sae = TRUE),
    by = "participant_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(has_sae = coalesce(has_sae, FALSE)) %>%
  group_by(tx_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_randomized_subjects = n_distinct(participant_id),
    n_randomized_subjects_with_sae = sum(has_sae),
    total_saes = sum(dsmb_events$event_class == "SAE" & dsmb_events$tx_group == first(tx_group), na.rm = TRUE),
    proportion_with_sae = 100 * n_randomized_subjects_with_sae / n_randomized_subjects,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dsmb_4_1
```

```{r dsmb-4-2, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dsmb_4_2 <- dsmb_events %>%
  filter(event_class == "SAE") %>%
  arrange(tx_group, visit_date, participant_id, csn) %>%
  group_by(tx_group) %>%
  mutate(sae_number = paste0("SAE-", str_pad(row_number(), 3, pad = "0"))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    `Treatment Group` = tx_group,
    `SAE #` = sae_number,
    `Subject ID` = participant_id,
    `Date of Event` = visit_date,
    `Week in Study` = week_in_study,
    `Date of last dose of blinded study medication` = NA_character_,
    `Relatedness to BLINDED study drug` = NA_character_,
    `Expected Y/N` = NA_character_,
    `Outcome` = NA_character_,
    `Description of Event` = event_detail
  )

dsmb_4_2
```

```{r dsmb-4-3, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
death_events <- event_master %>%
  filter(has_death_code, visit_date <= DATA_LOCK) %>%
  arrange(visit_date, participant_id, csn) %>%
  mutate(death_report_number = paste0("DR-", str_pad(row_number(), 3, pad = "0")))

dsmb_4_3 <- death_events %>%
  transmute(
    `DR #` = death_report_number,
    `Subject ID` = participant_id,
    `Treatment Group (A,B)` = tx_group,
    `Date of Death` = visit_date,
    `Week in Study` = week_in_study,
    `Date of last dose of BLINDED study medication` = NA_character_,
    `Relatedness to BLINDED study drug` = NA_character_,
    `Suicide Y/N` = if_else(has_attempt | has_ideation | has_selfharm_mech, "Y", "N"),
    `Description of Event` = if_else(
      death_codes != "",
      paste0("Provisional ICD-based death flag: ", death_codes),
      "Provisional ICD-based death flag"
    )
  )

dsmb_4_3
```

```{r dsmb-4-5, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
row_order_4_5 <- c(
  "Total SAEs",
  "Suicide Attempts",
  "Non-suicidal self-injury that results in an ED visit or hospitalization",
  "Total Self-harm AEs",
  "Non-suicidal self-injury that does not result in an ED visit or hospitalization"
)

ae_events_4_5 <- dsmb_events %>%
  filter(event_detail %in% c(
    "Suicide Attempts",
    "Non-suicidal self-injury that results in an ED visit or hospitalization",
    "Non-suicidal self-injury that does not result in an ED visit or hospitalization"
  )) %>%
  transmute(
    participant_id, csn, visit_date, site, tx_group, row = event_detail
  ) %>%
  distinct()

ae_events_4_5_with_totals <- bind_rows(
  ae_events_4_5,
  ae_events_4_5 %>%
    filter(row %in% c(
      "Suicide Attempts",
      "Non-suicidal self-injury that results in an ED visit or hospitalization"
    )) %>%
    mutate(row = "Total SAEs"),
  ae_events_4_5 %>%
    mutate(row = "Total Self-harm AEs")
) %>%
  distinct()

counts_long_4_5 <- ae_events_4_5_with_totals %>%
  mutate(col = case_when(
    site == "Harlem" & tx_group == "Control" ~ "Harlem - Control",
    site == "Harlem" & tx_group == "TX" ~ "Harlem - TX",
    site == "Kings"  & tx_group == "Control" ~ "Kings - Control",
    site == "Kings"  & tx_group == "TX" ~ "Kings - TX",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(col)) %>%
  count(row, col, name = "n") %>%
  complete(
    row = row_order_4_5,
    col = c("Harlem - Control", "Harlem - TX", "Kings - Control", "Kings - TX"),
    fill = list(n = 0L)
  )

cumulative_4_5 <- ae_events_4_5_with_totals %>%
  count(row, name = "Cumulative") %>%
  complete(row = row_order_4_5, fill = list(Cumulative = 0L))

dsmb_4_5 <- counts_long_4_5 %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = col, values_from = n, values_fill = 0L) %>%
  left_join(cumulative_4_5, by = "row") %>%
  mutate(row = factor(row, levels = row_order_4_5)) %>%
  arrange(row) %>%
  rename(`# of AEs` = row) %>%
  select(
    `# of AEs`,
    Cumulative,
    `Harlem - Control`,
    `Harlem - TX`,
    `Kings - Control`,
    `Kings - TX`
  )

dsmb_4_5
```

```{r dsmb-4-6, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dsmb_4_6 <- dsmb_events %>%
  filter(event_detail %in% c(
    "Suicide Attempts",
    "Non-suicidal self-injury that results in an ED visit or hospitalization",
    "Non-suicidal self-injury that does not result in an ED visit or hospitalization"
  )) %>%
  arrange(event_class, visit_date, participant_id, csn) %>%
  group_by(event_class) %>%
  mutate(
    event_number = row_number(),
    `SAE#` = if_else(event_class == "SAE", paste0("SAE-", str_pad(event_number, 3, pad = "0")), NA_character_),
    `AE#`  = if_else(event_class == "AE",  paste0("AE-",  str_pad(event_number, 3, pad = "0")), NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    `SAE#`,
    `AE#`,
    `TX Group` = tx_group,
    `Subject ID` = participant_id,
    `Date of Event` = visit_date,
    `Week in Study` = week_in_study,
    `Expected (Y/N)` = NA_character_,
    `Outcome` = NA_character_,
    `SAE type` = if_else(event_class == "SAE", event_detail, NA_character_),
    `AE type` = if_else(event_class == "AE", event_detail, NA_character_),
    `Method of Attempt` = case_when(
      attempt_codes != "" ~ attempt_codes,
      selfharm_codes != "" ~ selfharm_codes,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    `Was treatment received for attempt?` = if_else(
      event_detail == "Suicide Attempts",
      if_else(!is.na(procedures_raw) & str_squish(procedures_raw) != "", "Y", "N"),
      NA_character_
    ),
    `If no treatment, was this the most recent attempt?` = NA_character_
  )

dsmb_4_6
```

```{r dsmb-output, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (SHOW_DSMB && REPORT_MODE == "DSMB") {
  cat("\n\n# Section 4: Safety Data\n\n")

  cat("\n## 4.1 Proportion of Serious Adverse Events by Treatment Group\n\n")
  print(dsmb_4_1)

  cat("\n## 4.2 Serious Adverse Events Listing by Treatment Group\n\n")
  print(dsmb_4_2)

  cat("\n## 4.3 Death Reports\n\n")
  print(dsmb_4_3)

  cat("\n## 4.5 Number of Self-harm Adverse Events by Site and Treatment\n\n")
  print(dsmb_4_5)

  cat("\n## 4.6 Self-harm Reports\n\n")
  print(dsmb_4_6)
}
```
